title: helichrysum cochinchinense
intro: Helichrysum cochinchinense, also known as 'False Kerosene' or 'Luminous Plant', is a flowering plant native to Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing pain, inflammation, and promoting wound healing, as well as being used to treat respiratory issues and digestive problems. Helichrysum cochinchinense can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and essential oils for use in traditional medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
